nasb.text: So you shall come to the Levitical priest or the judge who is in office in those days, and you shall inquire of them and they will declare to you the verdict in the case.

esv.text: And you shall come to the Levitical priests and to the judge who is in office in those days, and you shall consult them, and they shall declare to you the decision.

cnv.text: 去見利未支派的祭司和當時的審判官，詢問他們，他們就必指示你們怎樣判斷這案件。

ccb.text: 交给当值的利未祭司和审判官去审理。
